title: Racosperma howittii
taxonomy: Racosperma howittii is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to Victoria in Australia, where it grows in the wild. The classification of Racosperma howittii places it within the subgenus Acacia, which is a group of shrubs and trees commonly known as acacia. Within the subgenus Acacia, Racosperma howittii is further classified as part of the Acacia sect. Gummiferae. This classification is based on its unique characteristics and growth habits.
